summary: Verified ARC explainability features: retention reasoning (kept/dropped/compressed/reused), history token budget enforcement, and frontend Inspector/Artifacts UI. All features working correctly.
test_credentials: No credentials required - using michael@example.com as default user context

context_for_next_testing_agent: ARC explainability features verified. Session 1f96af18-13bf-40d2-8478-4ac1f52a584c has receipts demonstrating: (1) low-signal message dropping (ok, thanks, got it), (2) history token budget enforcement (budget=500, before=1148, after=487), (3) message compression, (4) retention explanation strings. Frontend Inspector panel (via Tools button) and Artifacts drawer (Receipts tab) both display retention counts correctly.

backend_arc_explainability.POST /api/caos/chat receipt: Contains all required fields: retained_messages, dropped_messages, compressed_messages, reused_memories, reused_continuity, retention_explanation
backend_arc_explainability.dropped_messages structure: Each entry has id, role, reason (low_signal_message/duplicate_message), excerpt
backend_arc_explainability.retained_messages structure: Each entry has id, role, reason (kept_in_active_context), excerpt
backend_arc_explainability.compressed_messages structure: Each entry has id, role, reason (compressed_into_history_summary), excerpt
backend_arc_explainability.budget_trimmed_messages structure: Each entry has id, role, reason (trimmed_for_token_budget/trimmed_to_fit_token_budget), excerpt
backend_arc_explainability.reused_continuity structure: Each entry has id, kind (summary/seed/worker), reason (rehydrated_summary/rehydrated_seed/reused_lane_worker), excerpt
backend_arc_explainability.retention_explanation: Array of human-readable strings explaining what was kept/dropped/compressed/trimmed/reused

frontend_inspector_panel.location: Opened via Tools button in left rail
frontend_inspector_panel.budget_grid: Shows History budget, Before, After values
frontend_inspector_panel.dropped_message_details: Shows dropped messages with reason and excerpt
frontend_inspector_panel.reused_continuity_details: Shows reused summaries/seeds/workers with kind and excerpt

frontend_artifacts_drawer.location: Opened via Files button in quick actions
frontend_artifacts_drawer.receipts_tab: Shows all receipts with retention counts (Kept X · Dropped Y · Compressed Z · Trimmed W)
frontend_artifacts_drawer.retention_explanation_preview: Shows first line of retention_explanation for each receipt

frontend_inline_receipt.location: Expanded via Receipt button on assistant messages
frontend_inline_receipt.content: Shows Kept/Dropped/Compressed/Trimmed counts and first retention explanation line
